rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION TO TRANSFER TO CONTRA COSTA COUNTY
Notice Of Motion & Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery Requests Where No Responses Have Been Provided; Req. For Judicial Ntc
rulings.Rulings: Matter on calendar for Thursday, July 26, 2007. Conservator Debra Dolch's motion to compel responses to form and special interrogatories, request for production of documents, and to deem certain matters admitted is taken off calendar at the request of the moving party. = (BEC/610)
